findings.description: Table 1 data appears both as a full-page screenshot image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The 612pt-wide image with empty alt text placed immediately before the HTML table duplicates the same content.
findings.evidence:
HTML has immediately followed by . PDF page 5 contains only Table 1 data, so the 612pt-wide image is a page screenshot duplicating the table.

findings.description: Table 2 data appears both as a full-page screenshot image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The 612pt-wide image with empty alt text placed immediately before the HTML table duplicates the same content.
findings.evidence:
HTML has immediately followed by . PDF page 10 contains only Table 2 data, so the 612pt-wide image is a page screenshot duplicating the table.

findings.description: Two full-page-width images have empty alt text (alt=""), providing no information about their content.
findings.evidence: Two tags with alt="" and style="width: 612.0pt": one after Map 2 and one after Map 5. These appear to be full-page screenshots of the table pages but have no descriptive alt text.
